- **App:** `com.companyname.MauiTest` (arm64)
- **Signal:** SIGABRT — abort message: *"not compatible"*
- **Runtime:** Mono (`libmonosgen-2.0.so`)
- **BuildId:** `1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be`

**.NET Runtime Frames (unsymbolicated):**
| Frame | PC Offset | Library |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| #01 | 0x222098 | libmonosgen-2.0.so |
| #02 | 0x2241ac | libmonosgen-2.0.so |
| #03 | 0x1abc80 | libmonosgen-2.0.so |
| #04 | 0x1abd14 | libmonosgen-2.0.so |

| #08 | 0x307c | `<anonymous>` (JIT code) |

The crash is from a .NET MAUI app (`com.companyname.MauiTest`) running on Android (arm64). The crash is a SIGABRT with the message "not compatible".

The backtrace shows frames in:
- `libc.so` (frame #00 - the abort call)
- `libmonosgen-2.0.so` (frames #01-#07 - the Mono/.NET runtime)


- An anonymous mapping (frame #08 - likely JIT-compiled managed code)
